descriptions.apartments: Curated luxury apartments in Dubai’s most desirable addresses — built for lifestyle and long-term value.
descriptions.villas: Private villas and townhomes with space, seclusion, and statement architecture in elite communities.
descriptions.commercial: Investment-grade retail and commercial spaces in high-footfall districts with proven demand drivers.
descriptions.penthouses: Ultra-luxury penthouses with panoramic views, private terraces, and world-class amenities.
descriptions.mixedUse: Integrated projects combining residences, offices, and retail — designed for convenience, yield, and prestige.

homeSlider.mainTitle: Curated Luxury & Ultra-Luxury Properties in Dubai and the UAE

seo.imageAltTemplate: {title} by {developer} in {location} — luxury property Dubai / UAE

artOfDetail.description: At Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokers, luxury is never accidental. It is curated — from the address and the layout to the investment story behind every unit. We advise discerning clients on luxury property Dubai opportunities, off-plan releases, and investment strategies designed for capital preservation and upside.
artOfDetail.ownerAlt: Portrait of Mohamad Kodmani — Dubai real estate investment advisor

pillarsSection.heading: A PRIVATE STANDARD: OUR PILLARS FOR LUXURY PROPERTY INVESTMENT

pillar1.title: Why Invest in Dubai Property?
pillar1.intro: Dubai remains one of the world’s most attractive destinations for property investment — combining lifestyle prestige with global liquidity.
pillar1.point1: High-demand luxury districts with strong resale activity.
pillar1.point3: Tax-efficient structure for many investors (subject to your circumstances).
pillar1.point4: Golden Visa pathway for eligible investors (including property thresholds).
pillar1.point5: International buyer access and transparent ownership frameworks.
pillar1.point6: A global city that continues to attract talent, capital, and brands.
pillar1.point7: A deep off-plan market with premium launches and flexible developer plans.

pillar2.title: What Is a Real Estate Portfolio?
pillar2.intro: A portfolio is not “more properties.” It is a deliberate mix of assets — designed to balance yield, growth, and exit liquidity.
pillar2.point1: Diversifies exposure across districts, unit types, and timelines.
pillar2.point2: Reduces risk through spread and disciplined entry points.
pillar2.point3: Targets returns via rental income and capital appreciation.
pillar2.point4: We structure, monitor, and manage the strategy — so your portfolio performs without noise.

pillar3.title: What Is Off-Plan Property in Dubai?
pillar3.intro: Off-plan properties Dubai buyers secure early — often before public launch — with staged payments to the developer.
pillar3.point1: Earlier entry points compared to completed stock (subject to project).
pillar3.point2: Potential uplift as construction milestones and demand mature.
pillar3.point3: Flexible payment plans that can reduce immediate capital pressure versus bank financing.

aboutHero.description1: Mohamad Kodmani is a Dubai real estate investment specialist, advising clients on luxury property Dubai opportunities, off-plan strategies, and portfolio building with a disciplined, numbers-first approach.
aboutHero.description2: With experience across contracting, business development, and real estate, he supports investors in selecting the right assets, negotiating the right terms, and executing with clarity — from acquisition to handover, leasing, and exit.
aboutHero.imageAltDesk: Luxury real estate advisory and investment strategy in Dubai

buildingExcellence.paragraph: At Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokerage, we do not “push units.” We design investment paths — selecting the right projects, the right entry points, and the right exit windows. Every recommendation is grounded in market reality, risk control, and a clear plan for capital appreciation and rental performance. In just two years, our team has supported investors in closing more than AED 650 million in transactions, targeting returns above 8% annually through disciplined selection and timing.

stats.label: Years of entrepreneurial and real estate experience.
Targeted annual returns for structured strategies.

aboutBuildingExcellence.heading: Real Estate Decisions Built for Wealth, Not Headlines
aboutBuildingExcellence.lead: At Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokerage, we design investment paths — not just transactions. Every recommendation is grounded in market reality, risk control, and a clear plan that balances capital appreciation with rental performance. In just two years, our team has supported investors in closing more than AED 650 million in transactions, targeting returns above 8% annually through disciplined selection and timing.

experience.label: years
experience.description: Of entrepreneurial and real estate experience across multiple sectors.

volume.label: AED 650 M+
volume.description: Transaction volume supported for investors in just two years.

returns.description: Targeted annual returns on structured investment strategies with controlled risk.

services.title: What We Deliver for Luxury Investors
services.intro: At Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokerage, you receive more than listings. You receive a private advisory process — built for luxury buyers, international investors, and clients pursuing off-plan properties Dubai opportunities with clear strategy.

cards.title: Investment Advisory & Off-Plan Strategy
items: Private consultation to align capital, goals, and risk profile.
Shortlisting premium launches and luxury property Dubai opportunities in high-demand locations.
Scenario planning for capital growth, rental yield, and resale liquidity.
Off-plan advisory: entry timing, payment plan structuring, and early unit selection before broad release.

cards.title: Portfolio Structuring & Asset Management
items: Building balanced portfolios combining cash-flow assets and capital-growth opportunities.
Mixing ready and off-plan assets to manage risk and timing.
Leasing strategy and tenant placement to optimise rent and reduce vacancy.
Performance reporting and ongoing optimisation based on market movement.

cards.title: Handover, Resale & Premium Positioning
items: Handover support: inspection coordination and defect follow-up for a smooth closeout.
Positioning the property for lease or resale with the right finishes and pricing strategy.
Discreet resale execution: serious buyer filtration and timing the exit for maximum value.
Furnishing and interior advisory for luxury units to drive premium rents and faster absorption.

services.footer: With us, you gain a long-term investment partner who reads the market, protects your downside, and targets the highest possible outcome with controlled risk.

aboutServices.sectionTitle: What We Deliver for Luxury Investors
aboutServices.intro: At Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokerage, you receive a private advisory process — built for luxury buyers, international investors, and clients pursuing off-plan opportunities with a clear plan from entry to exit.

points.p1: Private consultation to align capital, goals, and risk profile.
points.p2: Shortlisting premium launches in Dubai’s strongest locations.
points.p3: Scenario planning for growth, yield, and liquidity.
points.p4: Off-plan advisory: entry timing, payment plan structuring, and early unit selection.

points.p1: Building balanced portfolios combining cash-flow and capital-growth assets.
points.p2: Mixing ready and off-plan assets to manage risk and timing.
points.p3: Leasing strategy, tenant placement, and rent optimisation.

points.p1: Handover support and inspection coordination for smooth closeout.
points.p2: Positioning for lease or resale with the right finish and pricing strategy.
points.p3: Discreet resale execution with serious buyer filtration.
points.p4: Furnishing and interior advisory for premium performance.

footer.text: With us, you gain a long-term investment partner who reads the market, protects your downside, and targets the best outcome with controlled risk.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become the trusted private desk for investors seeking luxury property Dubai opportunities — building diversified portfolios designed for stable returns, strong upside, and clear exit liquidity.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver an advisory system that creates measurable outcomes for investors — with transparent analysis, disciplined selection, and responsible strategy execution across Dubai’s property market.

p1.title: Transparency
p1.text: Every assumption is stated. Every number is explained. Every recommendation is justified — so decisions are made with calm confidence.

p2.title: Expertise & Commitment
p2.text: We track market movement continuously and advise with intent — not noise — with genuine commitment to your outcome.

p3.title: Results & Professionalism
p3.text: Our priority is performance: protect downside, target upside, and execute with precision from acquisition to exit.

journey.heading: From Construction to Investment Advisory Leadership

2006.title: From Legacy to On-Ground Execution
2006.description: With roots in contracting and real estate, Mohamad establishes Al Bairaq Contracting in Dubai, building a foundation in delivery, quality, and execution.

2013.title: Business Development & Brand Growth
2013.description: He expands into business development, strengthening capabilities in operations, growth strategy, and customer-first delivery.

2016.title: Entrepreneurship & Operational Discipline
2016.description: Mohamad builds and manages businesses, reinforcing practical skills in cashflow management, risk control, and performance under pressure.

2023.title: Launching Mohamad Kodmani Real Estate Brokerage
2023.description: He launches the brokerage in Dubai, focusing on investment-led advisory, off-plan strategy, and portfolio building for serious buyers.

2023_2025.title: Structuring Investor Portfolios Across Dubai
2023_2025.description: In two years, the team supports investors in closing more than AED 650 million in transactions, focusing on disciplined entry points, premium launches, and end-to-end post-purchase execution.

hero.title: Sobha Realty
hero.subtitle: A premium developer recognized for craftsmanship, consistency, and investment-led communities designed to hold value over time.

whySobha.title: Quality-First Delivery
whySobha.description: A detail-driven approach to finishing and build standards — created for owners who refuse compromise.

whySobha.title: Community-Led Masterplanning
whySobha.description: Projects designed around livability: open green spaces, waterfront moments, and seamless connectivity.

whySobha.title: High-Demand Residential Addresses
whySobha.description: A portfolio positioned in districts with strong buyer pull and robust long-term desirability.

performance.title: Sobha — Market Presence
